full_text:
The tumor sample was approximately 3 cm in diameter and resembled a cyst.

Tissue was minced in small pieces and dissociated with: 14.55 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 300 µl Dispase + 150 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before, in the middle, and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer, RBC lysis with 4 ml for 5 min + 20 ml DMEM/F12+++. Additional filtering through 70 µm cell strainer and lysis in 3 ml of RBC + 15 ml DMEM/F12+++ for 5 min. The final pellet was resuspended in 2 ml of media.

Cell counts:

Biobanking

3 vials each of 3.85 E6 cells each were frozen. The cells were resuspended in 1 mL of STEMCELL Banker in each tube.
